_comment: Findings that the parameter-file validator (scripts/build/parameterValidate.py) should treat as intentional, so the CI gate does not fail on them. Each entry is matched by file basename + finding kind + the trailing parameter/element name. Keep this list minimal and justified.

exceptions.name: massDestruction
exceptions.reason: Pre-migration parameter name; this file exists to test the parameter-migration machinery. Remove once the validator applies migrations (Step 4).

exceptions.name: massDestructionFractional
exceptions.reason: Pre-migration parameter name; migration test fixture. Remove once the validator applies migrations (Step 4).

exceptions.name: scaleCutOff
exceptions.reason: Deliberately-invalid parameter included to assert run-time unknown-parameter detection. Must NOT carry ignoreWarnings (that would disable the run-time check), so it is excepted here instead.
